scripts.build: npm run build:direct && npm run generate:og && npm run generate:pwa && vite build && mkdir -p dist/src && cp -R app.js app-core.js sw.js llms.txt robots.txt sitemap.xml site.webmanifest og-image.png icons dist/ && cp -R src/locales dist/src/
scripts.validate: npm run build:direct && node scripts/validate-bundle.mjs && npm run generate:og && npm run generate:pwa && node scripts/validate-catalog.mjs && node scripts/validate-localized-catalogs.mjs && node scripts/validate-share-preview.mjs && node scripts/validate-seo.mjs && node scripts/validate-i18n.mjs && node scripts/validate-agent-guide.mjs && node scripts/validate-pwa.mjs
